name: Turkey Strips with Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Turkey breast, sliced and pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, pepper, and paprika in a shallow dish.
2. Coat the turkey slices with the seasoned flour mixture.
3. Pour artichoke liquid into a frying pan over medium heat and cook until bubbly.
4. Add meat slices to the pan and brown for 3-5 minutes; remove from the pan.
5. Add onion and butter to the pan, sautéing for 5 minutes.
6. Return meat to the pan with onion and butter.
7. Stir in chicken broth, lemon juice, grated Parmesan cheese, and sour cream.
8. Add turkey back into the pan and heat through.
9. Serve over cooked noodles.
10. Garnish with artichoke hearts.
